concerns.text: FR-004b mandates emitting a data_quality_warning when sample-size discrepancies exceed 5%; T024 mentions 'FR-004b sample-size mismatch detection' but does not explicitly generate the required warning message. Missing task coverage for FR-004b warning emission.

Constitution Principle III requires dataset checksums recorded under data/ directory. T076 records checksums in state YAML and T077 in manifest.json, but no task records them in data/checksums.txt as mandated. Missing task coverage for Constitution III data hygiene requirement.

Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent to verify external citations before review points are awarded. No task is defined to run Reference-Validator Agent on citations (Kohavi et al., John et al.). Missing task coverage for Constitution II verified accuracy gate.

FR-007 requires error-message descriptions ≤200 characters. T019 and T008 log errors with ERR-### codes but no task includes a check or test ensuring the 200-character length constraint is enforced. Missing verification task for FR-007 length constraint.

Constitution Principle VII requires provenance metadata (URL) recorded alongside extracted metrics in data/ directory. T019 stores URL in ABSummary but no task duplicates/archives provenance information in data/ directory. Missing task for Constitution VII provenance archival.
